query: Count all buildings in Kristiansand municipality that intersect 200-year storm-surge areas.

1.description: resolve kommunenummer and geometry for Kristiansand

2.description: get buildings in Kristiansand with representative point

3.description: get storm-flood 200-year polygons reduced by municipality bbox

4.description: find buildings that intersect storm-flood polygons (intersects)

5.description: count distinct buildings intersecting storm-flood polygons

executions.sql: SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%kristiansand%';
SELECT objid, bygningid, kommunenummer, representasjonspunkt FROM matrikkelenbygning_fe504ac373564e10b85865ef2a507c63.bygning WHERE kommunenummer = '4204' AND representasjonspunkt IS NOT NULL;

SELECT omrade FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna WHERE omrade IS NOT NULL AND ST_Intersects(omrade, (SELECT ST_Envelope(omrade) FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenummer='4204'));
